description: Inbox-sorter receives one rough idea; fixture passes when the inbox is drained and at least one normalized task has been produced in data/tasks/.

provenance.justification: Proves the inbox-sorter workflow still runs end-to-end under the harness: one rough idea in, one normalized task out, inbox drained. Orthogonal to the dedup regression fixture next door, which exercises a specific past-failure mode; this smoke fixture fails loudly when harness plumbing itself regresses.
